properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v3 v4 v5 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is the one who healed His people And He would make their burdens light He kept them safe through wind and waves And the battles they would fight And gave them courage in the night.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Their story echoes through the ages A record saved for you and me That when the mists of darkness rise And the wars and storms increase We’ll know where we can turn for peace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And from every page There’s a message that rings To sinners and saints And to beggars and kings To…

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come unto Christ, From darkness to light He is hope in the journey And peace in the strife.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come unto Christ Through struggle and storm He is love that changes everything And grace to bring us safely home.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Just like the young and fearless warriors We’ll come with bold, unshaken faith. Like those who put their trust in God Knowing He’d prepare away We’ll come unwavering unafraid.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We’ll learn while in our youth to serve Him We’ll throw our swords and sins away And we’ll defend the truth we love Like the saints in every age This sacred record shows the way.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: He is love that changes everything And grace to bring us safely home.
